modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c

6* the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
7*

9*
10* Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
11* distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

13* See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14* limitations under the License.
15*/
16
17
18#include "httpd.h"
19#include "http_config.h"
20#include "http_protocol.h"
21
22#include "apr.h"
23
24#include "ap_socache.h"
25#include "ap_mpm.h"
26#include "http_log.h"
27#include "apr_memcache.h"
28#include "apr_strings.h"
29#include "mod_status.h"
30
31/* The underlying apr_memcache system is thread safe.. */ view japanese
32#define MC_KEY_LEN 254
33
34#ifndef MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_PORT
35#define MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_PORT 11211
36#endif
37
38
39#ifndef MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_MIN
40#define MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_MIN 0
41#endif
42
43#ifndef MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_SMAX
44#define MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_SMAX 1
45#endif
46
47#ifndef MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_TTL
48#define MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_TTL    apr_time_from_sec(15)
49#endif
50
51module AP_MODULE_DECLARE_DATA socache_memcache_module;
52
53typedef struct {
54    apr_uint32_t ttl;
55} socache_mc_svr_cfg;
56
57struct ap_socache_instance_t {
58    const char *servers;
59    apr_memcache_t *mc;
60    const char *tag;
61    apr_size_t taglen; /* strlen(tag) + 1 */ view japanese
62};
63
64static const char *socache_mc_create(ap_socache_instance_t **context,
65                                     const char *arg,
66                                     apr_pool_t *tmp, apr_pool_t *p)
67{
68    ap_socache_instance_t *ctx;
69
70    *context = ctx = apr_palloc(p, sizeof *ctx);
71
72    if (!arg || !*arg) {
73        return "List of server names required to create memcache socache.";
74    }
75
76    ctx->servers = apr_pstrdup(p, arg);
77
78    return NULL;
79}
80
81static apr_status_t socache_mc_init(ap_socache_instance_t *ctx,
82                                    const char *namespace,
83                                    const struct ap_socache_hints *hints,
84                                    server_rec *s, apr_pool_t *p)
85{
86    apr_status_t rv;
87    int thread_limit = 0;
88    apr_uint16_t nservers = 0;
89    char *cache_config;
90    char *split;
91    char *tok;
92
93    socache_mc_svr_cfg *sconf = ap_get_module_config(s->module_config,
94                                                     &socache_memcache_module);
95
96    ap_mpm_query(AP_MPMQ_HARD_LIMIT_THREADS, &thread_limit);
97
98    /* Find all the servers in the first run to get a total count */ view japanese
99    cache_config = apr_pstrdup(p, ctx->servers);
100    split = apr_strtok(cache_config, ",", &tok);
101    while (split) {
102        nservers++;
103        split = apr_strtok(NULL,",", &tok);
104    }
105
106    rv = apr_memcache_create(p, nservers, 0, &ctx->mc);
107    if (rv != APR_SUCCESS) {
108        ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_CRIT, rv, s, APLOGNO(00785)
109                     "Failed to create Memcache Object of '%d' size.",
110                     nservers);
111        return rv;
112    }
113
114    /* Now add each server to the memcache */ view japanese
115    cache_config = apr_pstrdup(p, ctx->servers);
116    split = apr_strtok(cache_config, ",", &tok);
117    while (split) {
118        apr_memcache_server_t *st;
119        char *host_str;
120        char *scope_id;
121        apr_port_t port;
122
123        rv = apr_parse_addr_port(&host_str, &scope_id, &port, split, p);
124        if (rv != APR_SUCCESS) {
125            ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_CRIT, rv, s, APLOGNO(00786)
126                         "Failed to Parse memcache Server: '%s'", split);
127            return rv;
128        }
129
130        if (host_str == NULL) {
131            ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_CRIT, rv, s, APLOGNO(00787)
132                         "Failed to Parse Server, "
133                         "no hostname specified: '%s'", split);
134            return APR_EINVAL;
135        }
136
137        if (port == 0) {
138            port = MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_PORT;
139        }
140
141        rv = apr_memcache_server_create(p,
142                                        host_str, port,
143                                        MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_MIN,
144                                        MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_SMAX,
145                                        thread_limit,
146                                        sconf->ttl,
147                                        &st);
148        if (rv != APR_SUCCESS) {
149            ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_CRIT, rv, s, APLOGNO(00788)
150                         "Failed to Create memcache Server: %s:%d",
151                         host_str, port);
152            return rv;
153        }
154
155        rv = apr_memcache_add_server(ctx->mc, st);
156        if (rv != APR_SUCCESS) {
157            ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_CRIT, rv, s, APLOGNO(00789)
158                         "Failed to Add memcache Server: %s:%d",
159                         host_str, port);
160            return rv;
161        }
162
163        split = apr_strtok(NULL,",", &tok);
164    }
165
166    ctx->tag = apr_pstrcat(p, namespace, ":", NULL);
167    ctx->taglen = strlen(ctx->tag) + 1;
168
169    /* socache API constraint: */ view japanese
170    AP_DEBUG_ASSERT(ctx->taglen <= 16);
171
172    return APR_SUCCESS;
173}
174
175static void socache_mc_destroy(ap_socache_instance_t *context, server_rec *s)
176{
177    /* noop. */ view japanese
178}
179
180/* Converts (binary) id into a key prefixed by the predetermined
181 * namespace tag; writes output to key buffer.  Returns non-zero if
182 * the id won't fit in the key buffer. */ view japanese
183static int socache_mc_id2key(ap_socache_instance_t *ctx,
184                             const unsigned char *id, unsigned int idlen,
185                             char *key, apr_size_t keylen)
186{
187    char *cp;
188
189    if (idlen * 2 + ctx->taglen >= keylen)
190        return 1;
191
192    cp = apr_cpystrn(key, ctx->tag, ctx->taglen);
193    ap_bin2hex(id, idlen, cp);
194
195    return 0;
196}
197
198static apr_status_t socache_mc_store(ap_socache_instance_t *ctx, server_rec *s,
199                                     const unsigned char *id, unsigned int idlen,
200                                     apr_time_t expiry,
201                                     unsigned char *ucaData, unsigned int nData,
202                                     apr_pool_t *p)
203{
204    char buf[MC_KEY_LEN];
205    apr_status_t rv;
206
207    if (socache_mc_id2key(ctx, id, idlen, buf, sizeof buf)) {
208        return APR_EINVAL;
209    }
210
211    /* memcache needs time in seconds till expiry; fail if this is not
212     * positive *before* casting to unsigned (apr_uint32_t). */ view japanese
213    expiry -= apr_time_now();
214    if (apr_time_sec(expiry) <= 0) {
215        return APR_EINVAL;
216    }
217    rv = apr_memcache_set(ctx->mc, buf, (char*)ucaData, nData,
218                          apr_time_sec(expiry), 0);
219
220    if (rv != APR_SUCCESS) {
221        ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_CRIT, rv, s, APLOGNO(00790)
222                     "scache_mc: error setting key '%s' "
223                     "with %d bytes of data", buf, nData);
224        return rv;
225    }
226
227    return APR_SUCCESS;
228}
229
230static apr_status_t socache_mc_retrieve(ap_socache_instance_t *ctx, server_rec *s,
231                                        const unsigned char *id, unsigned int idlen,
232                                        unsigned char *dest, unsigned int *destlen,
233                                        apr_pool_t *p)
234{
235    apr_size_t data_len;
236    char buf[MC_KEY_LEN], *data;
237    apr_status_t rv;
238
239    if (socache_mc_id2key(ctx, id, idlen, buf, sizeof buf)) {
240        return APR_EINVAL;
241    }
242
243    /* ### this could do with a subpool, but _getp looks like it will
244     * eat memory like it's going out of fashion anyway. */ view japanese
245
246    rv = apr_memcache_getp(ctx->mc, p, buf, &data, &data_len, NULL);
247    if (rv) {
248        if (rv != APR_NOTFOUND) {
249            ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, rv, s, APLOGNO(00791)
250                         "scache_mc: 'retrieve' FAIL");
251        }
252        return rv;
253    }
254    else if (data_len > *destlen) {
255        ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_ERR, rv, s, APLOGNO(00792)
256                     "scache_mc: 'retrieve' OVERFLOW");
257        return APR_ENOMEM;
258    }
259
260    memcpy(dest, data, data_len);
261    *destlen = data_len;
262
263    return APR_SUCCESS;
264}
265
266static apr_status_t socache_mc_remove(ap_socache_instance_t *ctx, server_rec *s,
267                                      const unsigned char *id,
268                                      unsigned int idlen, apr_pool_t *p)
269{
270    char buf[MC_KEY_LEN];
271    apr_status_t rv;
272
273    if (socache_mc_id2key(ctx, id, idlen, buf, sizeof buf)) {
274        return APR_EINVAL;
275    }
276
277    rv = apr_memcache_delete(ctx->mc, buf, 0);
278
279    if (rv != APR_SUCCESS) {
280        ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_DEBUG, rv, s, APLOGNO(00793)
281                     "scache_mc: error deleting key '%s' ",
282                     buf);
283    }
284
285    return rv;
286}
287
288static void socache_mc_status(ap_socache_instance_t *ctx, request_rec *r, int flags)
289{
290    apr_memcache_t *rc = ctx->mc;
291    int i;
292
293    for (i = 0; i < rc->ntotal; i++) {
294        apr_memcache_server_t *ms;
295        apr_memcache_stats_t *stats;
296        apr_status_t rv;
297        char *br = (!(flags & AP_STATUS_SHORT) ? "<br />" : "");
298
299        ms = rc->live_servers[i];
300
301        ap_rprintf(r, "Memcached server: %s:%d [%s]%s\n", ms->host, (int)ms->port,
302                (ms->status == APR_MC_SERVER_LIVE) ? "Up" : "Down",
303                br);
304        rv = apr_memcache_stats(ms, r->pool, &stats);
305        if (rv != APR_SUCCESS)
306            continue;
307        if (!(flags & AP_STATUS_SHORT)) {
308            ap_rprintf(r, "<b>Version:</b> <i>%s</i> [%u bits], PID: <i>%u</i>, Uptime: <i>%u hrs</i> <br />\n",
309                    stats->version , stats->pointer_size, stats->pid, stats->uptime/3600);
310            ap_rprintf(r, "<b>Clients::</b> Structures: <i>%u</i>, Total: <i>%u</i>, Current: <i>%u</i> <br />\n",
311                    stats->connection_structures, stats->total_connections, stats->curr_connections);
312            ap_rprintf(r, "<b>Storage::</b> Total Items: <i>%u</i>, Current Items: <i>%u</i>, Bytes: <i>%" APR_UINT64_T_FMT "</i> <br />\n",
313                    stats->total_items, stats->curr_items, stats->bytes);
314            ap_rprintf(r, "<b>CPU::</b> System: <i>%u</i>, User: <i>%u</i> <br />\n",
315                    (unsigned)stats->rusage_system, (unsigned)stats->rusage_user );
316            ap_rprintf(r, "<b>Cache::</b> Gets: <i>%u</i>, Sets: <i>%u</i>, Hits: <i>%u</i>, Misses: <i>%u</i> <br />\n",
317                    stats->cmd_get, stats->cmd_set, stats->get_hits, stats->get_misses);
318            ap_rprintf(r, "<b>Net::</b> Input bytes: <i>%" APR_UINT64_T_FMT "</i>, Output bytes: <i>%" APR_UINT64_T_FMT "</i> <br />\n",
319                    stats->bytes_read, stats->bytes_written);
320            ap_rprintf(r, "<b>Misc::</b> Evictions: <i>%" APR_UINT64_T_FMT "</i>, MaxMem: <i>%u</i>, Threads: <i>%u</i> <br />\n",
321                    stats->evictions, stats->limit_maxbytes, stats->threads);
322            ap_rputs("<hr><br />\n", r);
323        }
324        else {
325            ap_rprintf(r, "Version: %s [%u bits], PID: %u, Uptime: %u hrs %s\n",
326                    stats->version , stats->pointer_size, stats->pid, stats->uptime/3600, br);
327            ap_rprintf(r, "Clients:: Structures: %d, Total: %d, Current: %u %s\n",
328                    stats->connection_structures, stats->total_connections, stats->curr_connections, br);
329            ap_rprintf(r, "Storage:: Total Items: %u, Current Items: %u, Bytes: %" APR_UINT64_T_FMT " %s\n",
330                    stats->total_items, stats->curr_items, stats->bytes, br);
331            ap_rprintf(r, "CPU:: System: %u, User: %u %s\n",
332                    (unsigned)stats->rusage_system, (unsigned)stats->rusage_user , br);
333            ap_rprintf(r, "Cache:: Gets: %u, Sets: %u, Hits: %u, Misses: %u %s\n",
334                    stats->cmd_get, stats->cmd_set, stats->get_hits, stats->get_misses, br);
335            ap_rprintf(r, "Net:: Input bytes: %" APR_UINT64_T_FMT ", Output bytes: %" APR_UINT64_T_FMT " %s\n",
336                    stats->bytes_read, stats->bytes_written, br);
337            ap_rprintf(r, "Misc:: Evictions: %" APR_UINT64_T_FMT ", MaxMem: %u, Threads: %u %s\n",
338                    stats->evictions, stats->limit_maxbytes, stats->threads, br);
339        }
340    }
341
342}
343
344static apr_status_t socache_mc_iterate(ap_socache_instance_t *instance,
345                                       server_rec *s, void *userctx,
346                                       ap_socache_iterator_t *iterator,
347                                       apr_pool_t *pool)
348{
349    return APR_ENOTIMPL;
350}
351
352static const ap_socache_provider_t socache_mc = {
353    "memcache",
354    0,
355    socache_mc_create,
356    socache_mc_init,
357    socache_mc_destroy,
358    socache_mc_store,
359    socache_mc_retrieve,
360    socache_mc_remove,
361    socache_mc_status,
362    socache_mc_iterate
363};
364
365static void *create_server_config(apr_pool_t *p, server_rec *s)
366{
367    socache_mc_svr_cfg *sconf = apr_pcalloc(p, sizeof(socache_mc_svr_cfg));
368    
369    sconf->ttl = MC_DEFAULT_SERVER_TTL;
370
371    return sconf;
372}
373
374static const char *socache_mc_set_ttl(cmd_parms *cmd, void *dummy,
375                                      const char *arg)
376{
377    apr_interval_time_t ttl;
378    socache_mc_svr_cfg *sconf = ap_get_module_config(cmd->server->module_config,
379                                                     &socache_memcache_module);
380
381    if (ap_timeout_parameter_parse(arg, &ttl, "s") != APR_SUCCESS) {
382        return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, cmd->cmd->name,
383                           " has wrong format", NULL);
384    }
385
386    if ((ttl < apr_time_from_sec(0)) || (ttl > apr_time_from_sec(3600))) {
387        return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, cmd->cmd->name,
388                           " can only be 0 or up to one hour.", NULL);
389    }
390
391    /* apr_memcache_server_create needs a ttl in usec. */ view japanese
392    sconf->ttl = ttl;
393
394    return NULL;
395}
396
397static void register_hooks(apr_pool_t *p)
398{
399    ap_register_provider(p, AP_SOCACHE_PROVIDER_GROUP, "memcache",
400                         AP_SOCACHE_PROVIDER_VERSION,
401                         &socache_mc);
402}
403
404static const command_rec socache_memcache_cmds[] = {
405    AP_INIT_TAKE1("MemcacheConnTTL", socache_mc_set_ttl, NULL, RSRC_CONF,
406                  "TTL used for the connection with the memcache server(s)"),
407    { NULL }
408};
409
410AP_DECLARE_MODULE(socache_memcache) = {
411    STANDARD20_MODULE_STUFF,
412    NULL,                     /* create per-dir    config structures */ view japanese
413    NULL,                     /* merge  per-dir    config structures */ view japanese
414    create_server_config,     /* create per-server config structures */ view japanese
415    NULL,                     /* merge  per-server config structures */ view japanese
416    socache_memcache_cmds,    /* table of config file commands       */ view japanese
417    register_hooks            /* register hooks                      */ view japanese
418};

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:31

/* 基盤となる apr_memcache システムはスレッドセーフです。 */

Original comment

/* The underlying apr_memcache system is thread safe.. */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:61

/* strlen(tag) + 1 */

Original comment

/* strlen(tag) + 1 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:98

/* 初回実行時にすべてのサーバーを検索して合計数を取得する */

Original comment

/* Find all the servers in the first run to get a total count */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:114

/* 各サーバーをmemcacheに追加 */

Original comment

/* Now add each server to the memcache */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:169

/* socache API 制約: */

Original comment

/* socache API constraint: */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:177

/* 何もしない。 */

Original comment

/* noop. */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:180-182

/* (バイナリ) id を、あらかじめ決められた名前空間タグを付加したキーに変換し、
 * 出力をキーバッファに書き込みます。id がキーバッファに収まらない場合は 0 以外を返します。 */

Original comment

/* Converts (binary) id into a key prefixed by the predetermined
 * namespace tag; writes output to key buffer.  Returns non-zero if
 * the id won't fit in the key buffer. */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:211-212

/* memcacheは有効期限までの時間を秒単位で必要とします。
     * 符号なし整数 (apr_uint32_t) にキャストする*前*に、これが正の値でない場合は失敗とします。 */

Original comment

/* memcache needs time in seconds till expiry; fail if this is not
     * positive *before* casting to unsigned (apr_uint32_t). */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:243-244

/* ### ここはサブプールを使ってもよいが、_getp はどうせ
     * 流行遅れになるほどメモリを食いつぶすように見える。 */

Original comment

/* ### this could do with a subpool, but _getp looks like it will
     * eat memory like it's going out of fashion anyway. */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:391

/* apr_memcache_server_create はマイクロ秒単位の ttl を必要とします。 */

Original comment

/* apr_memcache_server_create needs a ttl in usec. */

Japanese translation

Original comment

Original comment

Japanese translation

Original comment

/* create per-server config structures */

Japanese translation

Original comment

Japanese translation

Original comment

/* table of config file commands       */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_socache_memcache.c:417

/* フックを登録 */

Original comment

/* register hooks                      */
